description: Compile verified work trajectories into replayable tool-and-patch quests.

effects.playable_result: Presents the original public task and visible dialogue.
Turns each tool call and patch into an ordered interactive station.
Unlocks the exit only when replayed evidence matches recorded hashes.

world_effects.completion: A verified artifact materializes with provenance.
world_effects.failure: The local workbench resets without executing arbitrary commands.
world_effects.interaction: Inspect tools, apply patches, compare hashes, and run simulated gates.
world_effects.spawn: An Agentic Workbench appears in a sandbox projection world.
